title: hieracium sparsum subsp. subottomalicum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. subottomalicum, also known as a plant species within the dandelion family, is a type of flowering plant. The medicinal properties of Hieracium sparsum subsp. subottomalicum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Hieracium sparsum subsp. subottomalicum can be prepared for herbal use by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water to make a tea or by making a tincture with the plant's roots and leaves.
